actions.detail: requires_binding: no dataset bound for 'cd_cardholders' and no tenant dataset named 'cd-cardholders' exists (required columns: cardholder_id, cardholder_name, segment, card_product, home_state, tenure_months, risk_tier, prior_dispute_count, account_age_bucket)

requires_binding: no dataset bound for 'cd_transactions' and no tenant dataset named 'cd-transactions' exists (required columns: txn_id, cardholder_id, account_id, txn_date, txn_month, mcc, merchant_name, merchant_country, channel, entry_mode, amount)

requires_binding: no dataset bound for 'cd_disputes' and no tenant dataset named 'cd-disputes' exists (required columns: dispute_id, cardholder_id, account_id, txn_id, network, card_product, dispute_type, reason_code, reg_flag, severity, status, disposition, provisional_credit, chargeback_filed, deadline_bucket, assigned_tier, filed_month, age_days, deadline_days_left, amount, recovery_amount)

deferred.reason: Bespoke LangGraph recipes (Dispute Intake Copilot, Chargeback Representment Builder, First-Party Fraud Scorer, Provisional Credit Clock Sentinel) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.
